project_area: Homelessness prevention, rapid rehousing, homelessness diversion, homelessness re-entry, and innovative solutions for homelessness
demographic_requirements: Individuals and families who are homeless or at-risk of homelessness, including those exiting correctional institutions, living with HIV/AIDS, or in need of street outreach services
eligibility_summary: Nonprofit organizations must be 501(c)(3) and have existing programs in homelessness prevention, rapid rehousing, diversion, re-entry, or innovative solutions. Applications must be supported by an FHLBank Pittsburgh member financial institution.
